utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I have actually not heard of that .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Treeger
utterances.text: Yeah , well your friends are in violation of it .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Treeger
utterances.text: I have been a nice guy up until now , but uh , I do not need this grief .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Treeger
utterances.text: I am gonna call the landlord and tell him that Monica is illegally subletting here grandmother apartment .
